title: derris cavaleriei
intro: Derris cavaleriei, also known as the Chinese derris, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, such as alkaloids and glycosides, which are responsible for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The herbal preparations of Derris cavaleriei include extracts, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
